title: Characteristics of a Researcher - Comprehensive Quiz

questions.question: How many characteristics of a researcher are discussed in the PDF?
Which characteristic involves undertaking deep thinking and inquiry on the nature of observations and phenomena?
A research-oriented researcher is described as having deep thinking and inquiry on the nature of observations and phenomena. This is the characteristic of:
Which characteristic describes a resourceful investigator who finds new research topics, new problems, new solutions, and new perspectives?
Creativity allows a researcher to expand or even replace:
A resourceful investigator with _____ finds new research topics, new problems, new solutions, and new perspectives.
Which characteristic requires a researcher to be analytical and logical in conducting a scientific research study at the right time and the right place wisely and economically?
An active researcher who is analytical and logical in conducting research at the right time and place wisely and economically demonstrates:
Prudence means being _____ and logical in conducting research at the right time and place wisely and economically.
Which characteristic is defined by a productive researcher being dedicated to his/her specific field of interest even though scientific outcomes may take a long time or be negative?
A productive researcher is dedicated to his/her specific field of interest. This describes:
Scientific outcomes may take a long time or even be negative. A researcher with which characteristic will continue despite this?
A productive researcher with _____ is dedicated to his/her specific field of interest even when outcomes take a long time or are negative.
Which characteristic involves being willing to push through given boundaries of security and to take some risk of failure and rejection?
An impactful researcher who is willing to take risks of failure and rejection demonstrates:
Courage involves pushing through given boundaries of:
An impactful researcher with _____ is willing to push through boundaries of security and take risks of failure and rejection.
Which characteristic requires a researcher to be open to criticisms, healthy discussions, and exchange of ideas?
An intelligent researcher who is open to criticisms and healthy discussions demonstrates:
Open-mindedness includes being open to all of the following EXCEPT:
An intelligent researcher with _____ is open to criticisms, healthy discussions, and exchange of ideas.
Which characteristic involves being meticulous in collecting data and facts to arrive at honest conclusions?
A responsible researcher who is meticulous in collecting data and facts to arrive at honest conclusions demonstrates:
Intellectual Honesty requires a researcher to be meticulous in:
A responsible researcher with intellectual honesty is _____ in collecting data and facts to arrive at honest conclusions.
Which characteristic is described as a research-oriented researcher who undertakes deep thinking and inquiry on the nature of observations and phenomena?
Which characteristic describes a researcher who is analytical and logical in conducting research wisely and economically?
Which characteristic allows a researcher to find new research topics, problems, solutions, and perspectives that may expand or replace established ones?
A researcher who is willing to push through boundaries of security and take risks of failure and rejection possesses which characteristic?
A researcher who is meticulous in collecting data and facts to arrive at honest conclusions possesses which characteristic?
